chunks.text: Helpdesk Sales | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar Helpdesk Sales The IRIS Helpdesk handles certain items available for sale to members of the IRIS community. Sales are typically recharged to UC Berkeley acc

. Sales are typically recharged to UC Berkeley account strings, but some items may be purchased by personal check with an added processing fee imposed by the University. You may call or drop by our office to check on availability for individual items
